posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
For this dashboard which embeds cells and charts from Excel spreadsheets hosted on Microsoft 365 / SharePoint in monday.com:

Screenshot 2025-06-24 at 13.22.001920×2078 118 KB

When I click on Export to PDF…

Screenshot 2025-06-24 at 13.18.56566×300 13.7 KB

I get the rather disappointing result here:

Screenshot 2025-06-24 at 13.22.502148×2278 154 KB

This is because the export functionality ignores all third-party widgets and just displays a blank hole.

As a third-party widget developer, I’d like to be able to provide that data for my customers.

Please improve this functionality so that it works for all widgets, not just those created by monday.com.
